mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alert_record(device_id, device_code, alert_type, alert_level, alert_content, status) VALUES(#{deviceId}, #{deviceCode}, #{alertType}, #{alertLevel}, #{alertContent}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE alert_record SET status = #{status}, handle_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert_record
AND device_code LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alert_record WHERE status = 0
SELECT * FROM alert_record ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
